### Runtime Requirements

| Requirement | Minimum Version | Notes |
|---|---|---|

### AI Backend Requirements (choose one)

| Backend | Requirement |
|---|---|
| **AWS Bedrock** | Valid AWS credentials with Bedrock access; `AWS_REGION` env var set (default: `eu-central-1`) |
| **Ollama (local)** | Ollama running locally with `nomic-embed-text` and `llama3.2` models pulled |
